requirements.requirement: Events are versioned and typed for thinking/reasoning, answer deltas, tool lifecycle, policy, browser/computer, artifacts, metrics, cleanup, and final answer.
Product chat receives a safe projection; Runs/Tracing receives full detail.
Replay uses the same event stream.
Collapsed work lane remains Worked for Xs; expanded lane is glass-boxed and source-rich.
ARP-P0-014 and ARP-P0-015 reach live_pass or cross_client_pass.
